roomDescriptions: The walls weep with dark moisture, and something skitters in the shadows.
A putrid stench fills the air. The ground is sticky with something you'd rather not identify.
Pale light filters through cracks in the ceiling, illuminating dust motes that drift like tiny ghosts.
Chains hang from the walls, some still bearing their grim occupants.
The room pulses with an unnatural warmth, as if something living breathes within the walls.
encounterIntros: A bone-chilling shriek echoes as creatures attack!
The darkness itself seems to lunge at you.
You hear a wet, scraping sound before they appear.
loreFragments: Carved into the wall: 'They came from below. They always come from below.'
A tattered journal page reads: 'Day 47. The scratching has stopped. That's worse.'
Ancient runes glow faintly, warning of a sealed evil beneath.

roomDescriptions: This room appears to have been decorated by a very enthusiastic, very drunk goblin.
A sign on the wall reads: 'DANGER: Wet Floor (also monsters).'
Someone has arranged the skulls on the shelf in order of sass level.
The torches here are scented. Lavender, if you're wondering.
A motivational poster on the wall says 'Hang in there!' above a skeleton dangling from chains.
encounterIntros: A monster trips into the room. It seems as surprised as you.
Something waddles toward you menacingly. Well, it's trying to be menacing.
A creature pops out from behind a barrel yelling 'SURPRISE!' ...wrong room, apparently.
You hear a war cry that sounds suspiciously like a sneeze.
loreFragments: Graffiti reads: 'Kilroy was here. Then Kilroy was eaten.'
A complaint box on the wall is overflowing with notes about dungeon WiFi.
A recipe for 'Monster Surprise' is pinned to the wall. The surprise is that it's just chicken.

roomDescriptions: Massive pillars carved with the deeds of ancient heroes line this magnificent hall.
Golden light streams through crystal formations, casting rainbows across polished stone.
The chamber echoes with a faint, heroic melody as if the walls remember glory.
Murals depict great battles between gods and titans, their colors still vivid after millennia.
A vast space opens before you, the ceiling lost in shadow high above.
encounterIntros: A worthy foe steps from the shadows, weapon drawn with practiced grace.
The ground trembles as a powerful creature enters the chamber.
Ancient guardians awaken, their eyes blazing with eternal duty.
A figure of legend blocks your path, testing the worthy.
loreFragments: An inscription reads: 'Here fell Arathorn the Brave, who held the gate for seven days.'
A mural shows the founding of the First Kingdom, when heroes united the scattered peoples.
Crystal tablets record prophecies of a hero who would descend into the depths.

roomDescriptions: The stone is stained with old blood that no amount of time has washed away.
Twisted iron and broken dreams litter this forsaken place.
A cold wind carries whispers of those who perished here, their stories unfinished.
The architecture speaks of former grandeur, now corrupted beyond recognition.
Pale fungi grow in patterns that almost form words — almost form warnings.
encounterIntros: Something that was once human shambles from the darkness.
A corrupted creature emerges, its eyes filled with an ancient sorrow.
The shadows coalesce into a form twisted by dark magic.
A cursed warrior rises, bound by duty even in death.
loreFragments: A weary message etched in stone: 'We sought power. Power found us first.'
A faded banner of a fallen order still hangs, defiant against decay.
Scratched into the wall by desperate fingers: 'The corruption spreads. Trust no one.'
